summary: Created blossom-mock.mjs: Node HTTP server implementing PUT /upload (SHA-256 keyed in-memory store, returns {url}) and GET /:sha256 (serve bytes or 404). Added blossom-mock service to docker-compose.e2e.yml on port 3001 using node:22-alpine. Updated Makefile with test-e2e-image-sharing target; e2e-up/e2e-down now cover both strfry and blossom-mock. Updated run-e2e.mjs to wait for port 3001, pass NEXT_PUBLIC_BLOSSOM_BASE_URL to Next.js and BLOSSOM_BASE_URL to Playwright. Updated blossom.ts to read NEXT_PUBLIC_BLOSSOM_BASE_URL env var at module load for transparent E2E override. Created test-image.png (69 bytes, valid PNG). Created groups-image-sharing.spec.ts covering: two-tab send+receive (AC-60), lightbox open (AC-61), download filename (AC-62), retry button DOM presence (AC-63), reload persistence (AC-64).
